ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player plays for */,
  "draft_trades" TEXT /* Draft trades information */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service in the league */,
  "pre_draft_team" TEXT /* Pre-draft team of the player */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the player plays in */,
  "school" TEXT /* School the player attended */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The player's jersey number */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* The high school the player attended */,
  "nba_debut" TEXT /* The player's NBA debut date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game was played in */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, finals) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "three_pm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "three_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "off_reb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "def_reb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "tot_reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating for the player */,
  "double_double" INTEGER /* Whether the player had a double-double */,
  "triple_double" INTEGER /* Whether the player had a triple-double */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the award was won */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the draft pick was made */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Number of the draft pick */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Overall position the player was drafted in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the trade was made */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Number of the draft pick */,
  "traded_to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the pick was traded to */,
  "traded_for" TEXT /* What was traded for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_trades_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the salary is for */,
  "salary" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the player's contract (in years) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "line" REAL /* Line for the team */,
  "over_under" INTEGER /* Over/under for the game */,
  "money_line" REAL /* Money line for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_lines_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_lines_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
